KT
KT is a telecommunications company.<SEP>KT is a telecommunications company that provides internet services.<SEP>KT is a telecommunications company.<SEP>KT is a telecommunications company that provides internet services.<SEP>KT is a telecommunications company.

방문신청 is a method of applying for KT internet.

개통

약정기간
약정기간 is the period of time for a KT internet contract.

1년약정
1년약정 is a type of KT internet contract with a one-year period.

무약정
무약정 is a type of KT internet contract with no fixed period.

해지
해지 is the process of canceling a KT internet account.

2년약정
2년약정 is a type of KT internet contract with a two-year period.

KT 기사
KT 기사 is an installation technician working for KT.

기ga 인터넷
기ga 인터넷 refers to a type of high-speed internet service.

와이파이
와이파이 refers to a type of wireless internet connection.

에센셜
에센셜 is a type of internet service plan offered by KT.

기가 와이파이 홈
기가 와이파이 홈 is a device that extends Wi-Fi coverage.

FTTH
FTTH refers to a type of fiber optic cable infrastructure.

모뎀
모뎀 is a device that connects a computer to the internet.

위치
위치 refers to the location where the internet service is installed.

Wi-Fi 중계기
Wi-Fi 중계기 is a device that extends Wi-Fi coverage.

유선 AP
유선 AP is a type of access point that connects to a network using a wired connection.

VDSL
VDSL is a type of digital subscriber line technology.

세븐일레븐
세븐일레븐 is a convenience store where KT internet bills can be paid.

GS25
GS25 is a convenience store where KT internet bills can be paid.

10기가 인터넷
10기가 인터넷 is an internet plan offered by KT with a maximum speed of 10 Gbps.

에센셜 인터넷
에센셜 인터넷 is an internet plan offered by KT with a maximum speed of 100 Mbps.

기업용 전용회선
기업용 전용회선 is a dedicated line service offered by KT for businesses.

CU
CU is a convenience store where KT internet bills can be paid.

지로 납부
지로 납부 is a payment method for KT internet bills through banks.

자동이체
자동이체 is an automatic payment method for KT internet bills.

통신 복지 할인
통신 복지 할인 is a discount program for KT internet services offered to certain groups of people.

기초생활수급자
기초생활수급자 refers to people who receive basic living subsidies.

차상위계층
차상위계층 refers to people who are near the poverty line.

페이퍼리스
페이퍼리스 is a paperless billing service.

自动이체 할인
自动이체 할인 is a discount for automatic payment.

만 65세 이상 노인
만 65세 이상 노인 refers to people who are 65 years old or older.

국가유공자
국가유공자 refers to people who have made contributions to the country.

장애인
장애인 refers to people with disabilities.

KT 기업 고객센터
KT 기업 고객센터 is the enterprise customer center of KT.

10기가互联网
KT provides 10기가互联网as one of its internet plans.

企業用 전용회선
KT provides 기업용 전용회선 as a dedicated line service for businesses.

kt.com
kt.com is the official website of KT.

TV(IPTV)
TV(IPTV) is an internet protocol television service provided by KT.

전화 서비스
전화 서비스 is a phone service provided by KT.

이사 이전 서비스
이사 이전 서비스 is a service that allows customers to transfer their internet service to a new location.

방송통신위원회
방송통신위원회 is a committee that regulates broadcasting and telecommunications in Korea.

Q8

Q11

Q7

Q9

Q10

Q12
